title: Clip for use with a cooking device
abstract: In one aspect, a device can include a clip member including a first end and a second end. The first end can be configured to attach to cooking device and the second end can be configured to engage a handle member of the cooking device. The clip member can be configured to be positioned in a handle position where the clip member can be configured to hold the handle member in a substantially fixed position relative to the cooking device when in the handle position.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A device, comprising: a clip member including a first end and a second end, the first end configured to attach to cooking device, the second end configured to engage a handle member of the cooking device, the clip member configured to be positioned in a handle position, the clip member configured to hold the handle member in a substantially fixed position relative to the cooking device when in the handle position. 2. The device of claim 1 , wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in the handle position at least in part by rotating the handle member relative to the cooking device. 3. The device of claim 1, wherein the clip member is positioned in the handle position at least in part by engaging the handle member with the clip member at a position on the handle member. 4. The device of claim 1 , wherein a portion of the clip member is further configured to engage a lid component, the clip member is configured to be positioned in a lid position to hold the lid component in a substantially fixed position relative to the cooking device. 5. The device of claim 4, wherein the clip member is configured to be moved between the handle position and the lid position. 6. The device of claim 1 , wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in a dual position to simultaneously hold a lid component and the handle member in respective substantially fixed positions relative to the cooking device. 7. The device of claim 6, wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in the dual position at least in part by rotating the handle member with respect to the cooking device. 8. The device of claim 6, wherein the clip member is configured to be moved between the handle position, a lid position, and the dual position. 9. The device of claim 1 , wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in a disengaged position, the disengaged position being disengaged from a handle member and a lid 

 component. 10. The device of claim 9, wherein the clip member may be positioned in the disengaged position at least in part by rotating the handle member relative to the cooking device. 11. An apparatus comprising: a clip member configured to engage a handle, the clip member configured to hold the handle in a substantially fixed position relative to a cooking device when in a handle position, the clip member is configured to be positioned in the handle position at least in part in response to rotating the handle relative to the cooking device. 12. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein the clip member is positioned in the handle position at least in part by engaging the handle with the clip member at a position on the handle. 13. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein a portion of the clip member is further configured to engage a lid, the clip member is configured to be positioned in a lid position to hold the lid in a substantially fixed position relative to the cooking device. 14. The apparatus of claim 13, wherein the clip member is configured to be moved between the handle position and the lid position. 15. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in a dual position to simultaneously hold a lid and the handle in respective substantially fixed positions relative to the cooking device. 16. The apparatus of claim 15, wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in the dual position at least in part by rotating the handle with respect to the cooking device. 17. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein the clip member is configured to be moved between the handle position, a lid position, and a dual position. 18. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein the clip member is configured to be positioned in a disengaged position, the disengaged position not holding the handle or a lid relative to the cooking device. 19. The apparatus of claim 18, wherein the clip member is positioned in the disengaged position at least in part by rotating the handle with respect to the cooking device.
